entry.title: chasing the great world
entry.content:
Recently I rebuilt my homepage — partly for a fresh look, partly to chase after the great world out there.

There’s so much interesting, genuinely great work happening right now that we still need to learn: agents, agentic RL, and everything springing up around them. The field moves fast, and the only honest response is to stay curious.

So — try them out. Build with them, break them, learn how each layer works. That’s the whole point. ♪
entry.summary: rebuilt my homepage, and a note to keep learning the great work out there.
